account_deletion_body: We received a request to permanently delete your account. If this was you, click the button below to confirm. This action cannot be undone.

account_deletion_not_you: If you did not request this, ignore this email. Your account will remain safe.
account_deletion_warning: This action is permanent and irreversible. All your data will be permanently deleted.

pwd_rule_length: Your password must be between 8 and 31 characters.
pwd_rule_lowercase: Your password must contain at least 1 lowercase letter(s).
pwd_rule_number: Your password must contain at least 1 number(s).
pwd_rule_uppercase: Your password must contain at least 1 uppercase letter(s).
pwd_rule_username: Your password cannot contain your username.

You are receiving this email because we: You are receiving this email because we received a password reset request for your account at :server.
If you did not request a password reset,: If you did not request a password reset, no further action is required.
Enable networks and set your links. Only: Enable networks and set your links. Only enabled networks with a URL will appear in the footer.
local_files_patch_desc: Upload your patch files (GRF, GPF, etc.) via FTP to public/downloads/patch/. They will be publicly accessible at yourdomain.com/downloads/patch/filename — use this URL in your patcher's configuration.
local_files_client_desc: Upload installer files via FTP to storage/app/public/downloads/client/. Once uploaded, use the Local (FTP) option when creating a download to pick the file directly.
No files found in client folder.
Enter your game account username and reg: Enter your game account username and registered email. We'll send a reset link to that email.
forgot_game_password_desc: If you lost your game account password, you can reset it by entering your account username and the e-mail address used to register it. An e-mail will then be sent to that address with a link to reset your password.

Points are awarded immediately when the: Points are awarded immediately when the player clicks Vote Now. Compatible with any voting site (ToproHispano, RagnaTOP, etc.). No configuration required.
Enter this URL in the voting site's post: Enter this URL in the voting site's postback/webhook settings.
Points awarded immediately when the play: Points awarded immediately when the player clicks Vote Now. Works with any voting site.
Points awarded when the external site se: Points awarded when the external site sends a confirmation to your callback URL. Requires the site to support webhooks/postbacks.
Points are awarded when the voting site: Points are awarded when the voting site sends a confirmation to your server. Requires the site to support webhooks/postbacks (e.g. TopG, XtremeTop100 Gold).
You must log out all characters before c: You must log out all characters before converting vote points.
Make sure all characters of the selected: Make sure all characters of the selected account are offline before converting. The game server may overwrite Cash Points if a character is logged in.
All characters must be offline to change: All characters must be offline to change password.
vote_convert_offline_warning: Make sure all characters of the selected account are offline before converting. The game server performs automatic saves that may overwrite your Cash Points if a character is logged in. The administration is not responsible for lost points if this warning is ignored.
